entities.name: canonical_blocks.yaml
entities.context: Configuration file containing block definitions with detection_guidance for semantic analysis

entities.name: detection_guidance
entities.context: Property in canonical_blocks.yaml providing semantic triggers, examples, and context for block detection

entities.name: B14_BLURBS_REQUESTED
entities.context: Block type for detecting blurb requests - checks outbound offers, inbound requests, and contextual introduction scenarios

entities.name: B03_STAKEHOLDER_INTELLIGENCE
entities.context: Block triggered when partnership or collaboration is detected in transcript analysis

entities.name: B03_DECISIONS
entities.context: Block for capturing decisions or agreements mentioned in meetings

entities.name: B08_STRATEGIC_IMPLICATIONS
entities.context: Block triggered by strategic or vision-related keywords in analysis

entities.name: B06_RISKS_OPPORTUNITIES
entities.context: Block for capturing risk and opportunity themes from meetings

entities.name: B07_FOLLOW_UP_REQUIRED
entities.context: Block triggered when follow-up needs are identified

entities.name: manifest.json
entities.context: Output file generated in Step 5 of the meeting processing workflow

entities.name: semantic analysis
entities.context: Technique for understanding context, speaker roles, and implicit needs rather than keyword matching

relationships.context: detection_guidance is a property within canonical_blocks.yaml entries
Block detection uses semantic triggers for outbound/inbound/contextual checks, not just keyword grep
Triggered based on semantic detection of partnership/collaboration themes
Triggered when decisions or agreements are semantically identified
Triggered by semantic analysis of strategic/vision content
Triggered by semantic detection of risk/opportunity themes
Triggered when follow-up needs are semantically identified
manifest.json is generated based on block analysis defined in canonical_blocks.yaml
